name: renpy-language-support
description: Complete language support for Ren'Py visual novel engine - syntax highlighting, completions, hover docs, go-to-definition, and diagnostics

renpyMagic.diagnostics.warnUndefinedImag.description: Warn when show/scene references an image not defined in code. Disabled by default because images are often defined as files rather than in code.

renpyMagic.renpySdkPath.markdownDescription:
Path to the Ren'Py SDK folder. This is the folder you downloaded from [renpy.org](https://www.renpy.org/latest.html) that contains `renpy.sh` (macOS/Linux) or `renpy.exe` (Windows).

Examples:
- macOS: `/Applications/renpy-8.3.0-sdk`
- Windows: `C:\renpy-8.3.0-sdk`
- Linux: `/home/user/renpy-8.3.0-sdk`

renpyMagic.lint.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable native Ren'Py lint integration for more accurate error detection. Requires `#renpyMagic.renpySdkPath#` to be set. When enabled, lint runs on save and reports errors from Ren'Py's actual compiler.

renpyMagic.lint.onSave.markdownDescription: Run Ren'Py lint automatically when you save a file. Disable this if you prefer to run lint manually or if it's too slow on large projects.
